title: verbena rigida f. alba
intro: Verbena rigida f. alba is a variety of the Verbena rigida plant, a species of flowering plant in the verbena family, known for its white flowers and fragrant foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been reported to offer various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation. In herbal preparations, Verbena rigida f. alba is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to support mental health and well-being.
